notes: First-run screen now offers three ways to start — your music folder, spin the bundled sample, or connect Spotify. And platter only pauses Spotify on quit/update when it was actually driving a Spotify track.

win.notes: Windows build refresh with tinyjs 0.28.2: a real icon on the exe, no stray console windows, and a leaner install (just the exe and its launcher).

linux.notes: Linux: cover art restored (sips is macOS-only) and the whole ritual — music, crackle bed, run-out thump — moved off Web Audio so it plays clean.
